description: PROP-001 and PROP-002 are marked required:true in the verification architecture and specify fast-check property-based tests. The test file step2-serialize-note.test.ts imports fc from @fast-check/vitest at line 12 but never uses it. PROP-001 is covered only by a single example-based test (line 125-133) that calls serializeNote twice with the same hardcoded input. PROP-002 is similarly covered by a single example. Property-based testing with generated random inputs -- as mandated by the verification architecture Tier 1 -- is absent.
